subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath sent down unto them that dwell upon the earth. Verily He is the Omnipotent, Who doeth whatsoever He willeth, bestowing and withholding [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن علی من علی الارض انه لهو المقتدر علی ما یشاء یعطی و یمنع و
subcodes.subjects: @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
